description_long: This is a large, rectangular cardboard shipping box with a light brown exterior and black printed graphics and text. The box features the brand name 'mosh' and an illustration of a chair, indicating that it contains a chair. Product details such as model (MSH-WUD-5BL), color (black), net weight (12 kg), and dimensions (60 x 60 x 30 cm) are clearly printed on the side. The box also displays standard shipping and handling icons, as well as the phrase 'YOUR CHAIR HAS ARRIVED' along the bottom edge. The surface appears smooth and unblemished, with all sides sealed and no visible openings or handles. The overall appearance suggests it is a new, unopened parcel ready for delivery or storage in an urban environment.
description: A large, sealed cardboard shipping box with 'mosh' branding and chair product details printed in black on a light brown surface.
description_view_0: The front face of the box shows the 'mosh' logo, chair illustration, and detailed product information, including model, color, weight, and dimensions.
description_view_1: This view highlights the same front face as view 0 but from a slight angle, emphasizing the box's depth and the clear branding and text.
description_view_2: The side of the box is visible with less prominent branding, showing the top and a partial view of the product details.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1 from the opposite side, again showing the main branding and product information, but from a different angle.
